% Fig R2 (lognormal payoff): no-learning weighted 1-R^2 vs tau
% mpmath dps=100, market-clearing tol 1e-50
% v in {0.606530659712633424, 1.64872127070012815} (2-state lognormal, sigma=1), W=1.000

% Weights w = 1/2 (prod f_1 + prod f_0)
% G=20, UMAX=5.000, K=3, gammas in {0.50000000, 1.0000000, 4.0000000}

% gamma = 0.500000000000000000000000000000
